title: Money Shorts OS — Scene 1~6 Full-Set Image Generation Request Pack v2
purpose: final-prompts v1 + compiled visual plan v1을 소비해 Scene 1~6 전체를 generation target으로 갖는 full-set image generation request pack을 data-only로 구성한 결과. 기존 Scene 1/2는 고정 anchor가 아니라 reference 후보 / 재검수 대상이다. 이미지 생성/네트워크/ChatGPT·Playwright 실행 아님.

supersedes.reasonStale: v1 pack은 Scene 1/2를 고정 승인 anchor로 보고 generation target을 Scene 3~6만으로 한정했다. 현재 기준에서는 Scene 1/2도 새 Visual Rule Contract로 재검수해야 하므로, 3~6-only 전제는 stale이며 Scene 1~6 full-set으로 대체한다.

executionBoundaries.note: 이 pack은 Scene 1~6 full-set image generation request의 data-only 패키지다. 이미지 생성/네트워크/ChatGPT·Playwright 실행/OpenAI request body 생성을 하지 않는다. 실제 실행은 별도 Owner 승인 단계 이후 별도 구현체가 담당한다.

compatibilityAudit.description: 기존 Scene 1/2 reference의 현재 기준 호환성을 짧게 판정한 결과.
reasons: 기존 Scene 1/2는 새 Visual Rule Contract 이전에 승인된 anchor라서 현재 기준에서 자동 통과로 간주하지 않는다.
실제 이미지 compatibility가 새 기준으로 입증되지 않았으므로 full-set regeneration target에 포함한다.
최종 기준은 Scene 1~6 전체의 visual rhythm / tone / composition / graphic layer 일관성이다.
compatibilityAudit.conclusion: Scene 1/2를 고정 anchor로 두지 않고 Scene 1~6 전체를 generation target으로 재구성한다. 기존 1/2 이미지는 reference 후보로만 보존하고 새 기준으로 재검수한다.

referenceCandidates.note: 이전 Visual Rule Contract 이전에 승인된 reference 후보다. reuse를 강제하지 않으며 generation target에서 제외하지 않는다. 새 visual rule / prompt compiler / visual QA 기준으로 재검수해야 하며, 현재 기준 자동 통과로 간주하지 않는다.
이전 Visual Rule Contract 이전에 승인된 reference 후보다. reuse를 강제하지 않으며 generation target에서 제외하지 않는다. 새 visual rule / prompt compiler / visual QA 기준으로 재검수해야 하며, 현재 기준 자동 통과로 간주하지 않는다.

generationTargets.compositionSummary: indoor_personal / close_up — primaryFocus=hands_and_objects, faceFocus=minimized, tags=[hand_holding_phone, notification_glow, warm_neutral_light].

graphicLayerPlan.notes: 은은한 보조 레이어만 허용. 큰 숫자 금지. 전체화면 data-card 금지.
graphicLayerPlan.rolePolicy: 은은한 보조 레이어 허용, 큰 숫자 금지

generationTargets.finalPrompt: [scene_1 — scene_1_hook] Premium editorial life-economy realism, photographic look (not 3D, not animation, not illustration). Korean / Asian personal-finance short-form vertical 9:16 visual tone, calm warm-neutral editorial color grade. Everyday Korean household / urban economic life setting, grounded and believable — not a posed stock photo, not a glossy advertisement. Face-minimized: do not center on a person's full face; keep focus on hands, objects, and space (faces only incidental / background / cropped). Subtitle safe-zone: keep the lower portion of the frame clear and uncluttered for burned-in caption text. Fixed financial graphic layer is SUPPORTING ONLY — subtle premium accent, never a full-screen data card, never the dominant element. Deterministic overlay owns exact values: do NOT render any exact numbers, percentages, dates, or official source labels as trustworthy text inside the image. Exact numbers / dates / source labels are added later by a separate deterministic overlay stage; here use only neutral placeholder / chip areas with no real values. Do not converge into the failure combo: avoid the repeated wood-table + hand + smartphone + notebook + coffee composition across scenes. Hook intent: instantly make the viewer feel an economic signal touching their own daily life, giving a reason to stop and watch. 시청 유발 — 경제 신호가 '내 생활'에 닿는 순간을 즉시 체감시키는 후킹. Visual category "banking_notification_moment": 은행/금융앱 알림이 도착하는 순간. Use objects from the "banking_objects" visual family (e.g. bankbook, app screen, loan alert; varied within the family, not a fixed single prop) as the object focus. Set the scene in an intimate personal indoor space, with close-up framing on hands and the key object. Graphic layer for this scene: a subtle supporting financial graphic accent only (no large numbers). Avoid: forbidden object: full_face_closeup; forbidden object: luxury_items; forbidden object: cash_pile; forbidden object: panic_imagery; forbidden composition: fullscreen_data_card; forbidden composition: news_briefing_dominance; no full-screen data card; graphic layer must stay supporting; no face-centered stock-photo look; no wood-table + hand + smartphone + notebook + coffee convergence; no repeated scene look from the previous scene (different space / category / object family / composition); no exact numbers, dates, or source labels rendered as trustworthy text in the image. Note: exact numbers, dates, and source labels are added later by a deterministic overlay stage — do not bake them into this image.
negativePromptRules: no full-screen data card; graphic layer must stay supporting
no wood-table + hand + smartphone + notebook + coffee convergence
no repeated scene look from the previous scene (different space / category / object family / composition)
no exact numbers, dates, or source labels rendered as trustworthy text in the image

overlayPolicy.note: 정확한 숫자/날짜/출처/차트 값은 finalPrompt(이미지)에 넣지 않는다. 후속 deterministic overlay 단계가 소유한다. dataPeriod와 lastPolicyDecisionDate는 서로 다른 개념이며 이미지 안에 직접 넣지 않는다.

forbiddenRepetitionNotes: spaceType 'indoor_personal'는 직전 scene('none')과 다름 — same_space_repeat_limit 충족.
objectFamily [banking_objects]는 직전 scene과 겹치지 않음 — same_object_family_repeat_limit 충족.

generationTargets.finalPrompt: [scene_6 — scene_6_action_closing] Premium editorial life-economy realism, photographic look (not 3D, not animation, not illustration). Korean / Asian personal-finance short-form vertical 9:16 visual tone, calm warm-neutral editorial color grade. Everyday Korean household / urban economic life setting, grounded and believable — not a posed stock photo, not a glossy advertisement. Face-minimized: do not center on a person's full face; keep focus on hands, objects, and space (faces only incidental / background / cropped). Subtitle safe-zone: keep the lower portion of the frame clear and uncluttered for burned-in caption text. Fixed financial graphic layer is SUPPORTING ONLY — subtle premium accent, never a full-screen data card, never the dominant element. Deterministic overlay owns exact values: do NOT render any exact numbers, percentages, dates, or official source labels as trustworthy text inside the image. Exact numbers / dates / source labels are added later by a separate deterministic overlay stage; here use only neutral placeholder / chip areas with no real values. Do not converge into the failure combo: avoid the repeated wood-table + hand + smartphone + notebook + coffee composition across scenes. Action-closing intent: an organized wrap-up of this month's actions with a soft call to action. 액션/마무리 — 이번 달 점검할 행동 정리 + CTA. Visual category "closing_action_cue": 마무리 행동을 유도하는 정리 큐. Use objects from the "planning_objects" visual family (e.g. notebook, calendar, checklist; varied within the family, not a fixed single prop) as the object focus. Set the scene in a warm indoor living space, with medium shot balancing objects and surrounding space. Graphic layer for this scene: a supporting wrap-up / CTA-card placeholder area (no real text values). Object family planning_objects repeats from the previous scene (within the allowed 2-scene limit). Therefore enforce strong composition separation: the previous scene is a checklist / watch-point visual ("checklist_decision_moment", a calm indoor desk / work surface), while THIS scene is a closing / CTA / budget-wrap-up visual ("closing_action_cue", a warm indoor living space) with a different graphic layer role (a supporting wrap-up / CTA-card placeholder area (no real text values)). Different space, different category, different graphic-layer plan — the two scenes must NOT look alike, and must NOT converge into the wood-table + hand + smartphone + notebook + coffee combo. Avoid: forbidden object: investment_promise; forbidden object: cash_pile; forbidden object: panic_imagery; forbidden composition: fullscreen_data_card; forbidden composition: luxury_display; no full-screen data card; graphic layer must stay supporting; no face-centered stock-photo look; no wood-table + hand + smartphone + notebook + coffee convergence; no repeated scene look from the previous scene (different space / category / object family / composition); no exact numbers, dates, or source labels rendered as trustworthy text in the image. Note: exact numbers, dates, and source labels are added later by a deterministic overlay stage — do not bake them into this image.

objectFamily [planning_objects]가 직전 scene과 겹침 — 2연속 한도 내 허용 (same_object_family_repeat_limit: max 2연속). 이 scene(closing_action_cue, indoor_living)과 직전 scene의 selectedVisualCategory·spaceType·graphicLayerMode가 다르므로 구도·맥락은 분리됨. 다음 finalPrompt 단계에서 checklist/notebook/pen 구도(직전)와 closing/CTA/budget-wrap-up 구도(현 scene)를 명확히 분리할 것. wood_table/hand/smartphone/note/coffee 수렴 조합으로 연결되면 실패.
repetitionControlApplied.compositionSeparationDirective: Object family planning_objects repeats from the previous scene (within the allowed 2-scene limit). Therefore enforce strong composition separation: the previous scene is a checklist / watch-point visual ("checklist_decision_moment", a calm indoor desk / work surface), while THIS scene is a closing / CTA / budget-wrap-up visual ("closing_action_cue", a warm indoor living space) with a different graphic layer role (a supporting wrap-up / CTA-card placeholder area (no real text values)). Different space, different category, different graphic-layer plan — the two scenes must NOT look alike, and must NOT converge into the wood-table + hand + smartphone + notebook + coffee combo.

fullSetRepetitionEvidence.description: Scene 1~6 전체 기준 반복 수렴 방지 evidence. compiled visual plan diversityAudit를 그대로 보존한다.

packAudit.description: Scene 1~6 full-set image request pack v2가 final-prompts v1 + compiled visual plan v1을 소비한 결과 요약. static guard가 full-set target 정합성 + reference 후보 비제외 + supersedes를 대조한다.
